evals.prompt: My site https://solomax.app isn't showing up in Google searches. It's a Next.js app. What's the minimum SEO I need? Don't give me a 6-month content strategy, I just want the essentials.
evals.expected_output: An audit of the current state (via the bundled audit script), a technical SEO checklist with pass/fail, meta tag copy, a 10-keyword map across problem/alternative/category buckets, the first 5 SEO pages to create with H1s and slugs, an llms.txt draft, and Next.js code snippets.
assertions: The audit script is run against the URL or its checks are performed and reported with pass/fail evidence
Keyword targets are organized into problem/alternative/category buckets
A prioritized list of roughly 5 first pages is given with URL slugs and H1s
Code snippets are Next.js-specific (sitemap.ts, metadata) matching the stated stack
The output stays scoped to minimum essentials as requested rather than a full content strategy

evals.prompt: how do i rank on google for 'ai changelog generator'? my product does exactly that but we're on page 6.
evals.expected_output: A focused plan for that keyword: on-page optimization of the target page (title, H1, content structure), supporting pages (use-case and comparison pages), internal linking, and realistic expectation-setting about timeline and competition analysis of page 1.
assertions: The plan is specific to the stated keyword, including exact-match placement guidance (title, H1, slug)
Supporting/cluster pages are recommended with concrete examples
The output sets realistic timeline expectations rather than promising fast rankings
Analysis or inspection of current page-1 competitors is included or prescribed
